doc.linux: The Steam Deck payload is built from the immutable upstream source revision with the Semu game-frame patch. There is no host, Flatpak, or prebuilt Linux fallback.
doc.platforms: Only x86_64-linux is declared. Darwin remains unsupported until PCSX2 can be built reproducibly from this source contract; no application archive is substituted.
doc.rendering: The OpenGL device directly calls the shared ABI 2 renderer after the final upright GS draw, then calls its post-UI phase after FullscreenUI, OSD, and ImGui immediately before the emulator-owned swap.
